author: naazimsnh02
name: 12L Full-INT4 (MLP+Attn) + BigramHash(4096)
blurb: 12-layer transformer (dim=512, MLP 3x, GQA 8q/4kv) with SmearGate, BigramHash(4096, dim=64), orthogonal init, U-Net skip connections, group INT4 quantization (gs=64) for both MLP and attention, 10% magnitude pruning, zstd-22, SWA(frac=0.4), WD=0.04, batch=786432, warmdown=3000, sliding-window eval stride=64.
